title: Dynamic Programming Patterns
description: Breaks down the core DP patterns (0/1 knapsack, LCS, coin change) with annotated solutions.

title: Intro to Dynamic Programming
description: Bridges from plain recursion to memoized recursion to tabulation, using Fibonacci and climbing stairs.

title: Hard DP Problem Set
description: 10 hard-rated DP problems including edit distance, LCS variants, and partition problems.

title: Binary Search Trees Crash Course
description: Covers BST insertion, deletion, and the three traversal orders with animated walkthroughs.

title: Graph Algorithms Overview
description: Covers BFS, DFS, Dijkstra's, and when to reach for each in an interview setting.

title: Graph Theory Practice Problems
description: 8 medium-rated graph problems covering connected components, topological sort, and shortest paths.

title: Hash Tables Deep Dive
description: Explains collision handling, load factor, and amortized O(1) lookups.

title: System Design Fundamentals
description: Covers load balancing, caching, and database sharding through real interview-style prompts.

title: Big O Notation Explained
description: A friendly walkthrough of time and space complexity with everyday analogies.

title: Sliding Window Technique
description: Covers fixed and variable-size sliding window problems with template code.

title: Recursion Fundamentals
description: Base cases, call stacks, and how to trace recursive calls by hand.

title: Advanced DP: Bitmask DP
description: Problems using bitmask states for DP over subsets, common in competitive programming.
